name: Cloud Migration Services
description: Structured cloud migration program with assessment framework, modular CMF methodology (Assess-Mobilize-Modernize), 6R migration strategies (Rehost through Retire), database migration services, Cloud Migration Factory teams, and sprint-based implementation for secure, standardized migration execution.
positioning: Factory-model migration that de-risks large-scale cloud transitions. Competes on predictability and compliance rather than speed alone.
competitive_moat: CMF methodology, migration factory staffing model, regulatory migration playbooks
